channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Epstein victims use Super Bowl commercial to pressure Pam Bondi over withheld files
item.description: Super Bowl commercial targets Pam Bondi over Jeffrey Epstein files, with women demanding truth from attorney general. DOJ disputes claims it failed tr...

item.title: Not Everyone Watched the Game or the Halftime Shows. I Am One of Those, and I Have Thoughts.
That TMZ Poll Comparing Bad Bunny and Kid Rock Performances May Not Have Gone As They Anticipated
Bipartisan Senate bill targets money laundering linked to drug trafficking, terrorism
item.description: Senate Judiciary Committee Chairman Chuck Grassley and Sen. Amy Klobuchar introduced a bipartisan measure to crack down on money laundering by increas...

item.title: Is Bud Back? Patriotic Super Bowl Ad Is a Smash Hit With Fans
Poll: Paxton, Crockett Lead Texas Primary Senate Field
item.description: Republican Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton and Democrat Rep. Jasmine Crockett lead their respective U.S. Senate primary contests, according to polli...

item.title: Turning Point issues major endorsement in critical Senate race as Trump hints at weighing in
item.description: Turning Point Action has endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in his bid to unseat longtime incumbent Sen. John Cornyn, R-Texas, in a high-stake...

item.title: Sen. Kennedy Urges Senate Action on Cost of Living
item.description: Sen. John Kennedy, R-La., said he has "begged" Majority Leader John Thune, R-S.D., to "please bring bills to address the cost of living in America," w...

item.title: Hagerty urges FCC to punish Verizon over release of Senate phone data
item.description: Verizon handed over phone data from Senator Bill Hagerty and other GOP senators to Jack Smith's team investigating President Donald Trump and 2020 ele...

item.title: The Worst News Outlets of the Week - Who Dominated in Dysfunctional Coverage?
Armenian PM Pashinyan Says Trump Deserves Nobel Peace Prize
item.description: Armenian Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan on Monday praised President Donald Trump's role in advancing peace efforts and said he hopes the American lead...

item.title: UN Seeks Clarity on When US Will Pay Dues, and How Much
item.description: The United Nations said on Monday it is waiting for details on when and how much the United States will pay toward its delayed budget dues, following ...

item.title: Rubio blasts China over 'unjust and tragic' 20-year sentence for Hong Kong democracy activist Jimmy Lai
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio calls Jimmy Lai's 20-year sentence "unjust" as Hong Kong convicts the 78-year-old democracy activist under national sec...

item.title: Trump Oil Blockade Leaves Cuba Without Aviation Fuel, and That's a Good Thing
Venezuelan Shopkeeper to Newsmax: Optimistic for Change Since Maduro Capture
item.description: A Caracas store owner told Newsmax's Rob Schmitt that daily life in in the Venezuelan capital has changed little in the weeks since the capture of Pre...
